ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-29-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, #3689, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, LLP, appeared for plaintiff.
Barbara Anderson was present in pro per as wrongful death heir, and as successor-in-interest to Arthur Adnerson, deceased.
Edna Graham, Patricia Evansizer, Jeanette Gainsbrugh, Vickie Ivey and Cheryl Serota, all as wrongful death heirs, were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by wrongful death heirs Denise Waltz or Billie Sue Duff.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Arthur Anderson, payable to Barbara Anderson - 0%
Barbara Anderson as wrongful death heir - 65%
Edna Graham as wrongful death heir - 5%
Patricia Evansizer as wrongful death heir - 5%
Jennette Gainsbrugh as wrongful death heir - 5%
Vickie Ivey as wrongful death heir - 5%
Cheryl Serota as wrongful death heir - 5%
Denise Waltz as wrongful death heir - 5%
Billie Sue Duff as wrongful death heir - 5%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell LLP shall receive $1,083.00 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.

All future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above. The signature of Barbara Anderson shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purposes of settling all claims with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Hearing On The Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
